rationale: In the citing paper, Su, Fern, and Ye (2003) appears only once in a grouped citation alongside Corfman and Lehmann (1987) to indicate that prior marketing research has examined spousal decision making. The text does not discuss any specific model, finding, measure, or mechanism from Su et al. (2003), nor does it use that paper directly in hypothesis development, design, or interpretation. This functions as broad background positioning rather than a distinct, paper-specific contribution link.
